svg.title: Library genre activity heatmap
svg.desc: Genre heatmap from 2026-04-01 to 2026-04-15. Each row is a selected genre and each column is a day. Darker cells mean more active loans for that genre on that day, and the tooltip text also includes the genre's share of the selected activity for that day.
svg.text: One-glance subject activity story for the SQLite circulation history. Labels above the grid show the date and total active selected-genre loans for that day.
Cell values show active-loan counts. Darker blues indicate heavier load; tooltip descriptions include per-day activity share.
